tEn: Generating Long Sequences with Sparse Transformers
sEn: Sparse Transformers reduce attention complexity to O(n√n), enabling modeling of sequences up to tens of thousands of timesteps with hundreds of layers.
sZh: 稀疏Transformer将注意力复杂度降至O(n√n)，能够用数百层网络建模长达数万时间步的序列。
absEn: Transformers are powerful sequence models, but require time and memory that grows quadratically with the sequence length. In this paper we introduce sparse factorizations of the attention matrix which reduce this to $O(n \sqrt{n})$. We also introduce a) a variation on architecture and initialization to train deeper networks, b) the recomputation of attention matrices to save memory, and c) fast attention kernels for training. We call networks with these changes Sparse Transformers, and show they can model sequences tens of thousands of timesteps long using hundreds of layers. We use the same architecture to model images, audio, and text from raw bytes, setting a new state of the art for density modeling of Enwik8, CIFAR-10, and ImageNet-64. We generate unconditional samples that demonstrate global coherence and great diversity, and show it is possible in principle to use self-attention to model sequences of length one million or more.
absZh: Transformer是强大的序列模型，但其时间和内存需求随序列长度呈二次方增长。本文引入了注意力矩阵的稀疏分解，将其降至O(n√n)。我们还提出了：a) 一种架构和初始化的变体以训练更深的网络，b) 重新计算注意力矩阵以节省内存，以及c) 用于训练的快速注意力内核。我们将具有这些变化的网络称为稀疏Transformer，并展示了它们可以使用数百层网络建模数万时间步长的序列。我们使用相同的架构从原始字节建模图像、音频和文本，在Enwik8、CIFAR-10和ImageNet-64的密度建模上创造了新的最先进水平。我们生成了无条件样本，展示了全局一致性和极大的多样性，并表明原则上可以使用自注意力建模长度超过一百万的序列。

contrib.en: Introduced sparse factorizations of the attention matrix reducing complexity to O(n√n).
contrib.zh: 提出了注意力矩阵的稀疏分解，将复杂度降至 O(n√n)。

contrib.en: Proposed architectural and initialization changes to train deeper networks.
contrib.zh: 提出了架构和初始化改进以训练更深网络。

contrib.en: Introduced recomputation of attention matrices to save memory during training.
contrib.zh: 引入注意力矩阵重计算以节省训练内存。

contrib.en: Developed fast GPU kernels for sparse attention operations.
contrib.zh: 开发了用于稀疏注意力操作的快速 GPU 内核。

contrib.en: Achieved state-of-the-art density modeling on Enwik8, CIFAR-10, and ImageNet-64.
contrib.zh: 在 Enwik8、CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet-64 上实现了最先进的密度建模。

contrib.en: Demonstrated self-attention can model sequences of length one million or more.
contrib.zh: 证明了自注意力可建模长度超过一百万的序列。

limits.en: Sparse patterns may not capture all data-dependent attention patterns.
limits.zh: 稀疏模式可能无法捕获所有数据依赖的注意力模式。

limits.en: Performance degrades for very long sequences due to reduced model capacity.
limits.zh: 由于模型容量降低，超长序列性能下降。

limits.en: Fixed attention patterns require careful hyperparameter tuning for different data types.
limits.zh: 固定注意力模式需要针对不同数据类型仔细调整超参数。

limits.en: Strided attention fails on data without periodic structure like text.
limits.zh: 步长注意力在无周期结构的数据（如文本）上效果不佳。

limits.en: Training very deep networks still requires careful initialization and architecture modifications.
limits.zh: 训练极深网络仍需仔细的初始化和架构修改。

items.en: Transformers are powerful sequence models, but require time and memory that grows quadratically with the sequence length. In this paper we introduce sparse factorizations of the attention matrix which reduce this to O​(n​n)𝑂𝑛𝑛O(n\sqrt{n}). We also introduce a) a variation on architecture and initialization to train deeper networks, b) the recomputation of attention matrices to save memory, and c) fast attention kernels for training. We call networks with these changes Sparse Transformers, and show they can model sequences tens of thousands of timesteps long using hundreds of layers. We use the same architecture to model images, audio, and text from raw bytes, setting a new state of the art for density modeling of Enwik8, CIFAR-10, and ImageNet-64. We generate unconditional samples that demonstrate global coherence and great diversity, and show it is possible in principle to use self-attention to model sequences of length one million or more.
items.zh: Transformer 是强大的序列模型，但其时间和内存需求随序列长度呈二次增长。本文引入注意力矩阵的稀疏分解，将其降至 O(n√n)。我们还引入了：a) 用于训练更深网络的架构和初始化变体，b) 注意力矩阵的重计算以节省内存，以及 c) 用于训练的快速注意力核。我们将具有这些变化的网络称为稀疏 Transformer，并展示它们能够使用数百层对长达数万时间步的序列进行建模。我们使用相同的架构对原始字节形式的图像、音频和文本进行建模，在 Enwik8、CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet-64 的密度建模上创造了新的最优结果。我们生成了具有全局连贯性和高度多样性的无条件样本，并展示了原则上可以使用自注意力对长度超过一百万的序列进行建模。

items.en: Estimating complex, high-dimensional data distributions is a central problem in unsupervised learning, as many downstream applications of interest involve generation of text, images, audio, and other data. Additionally, it is believed to be a key component of unsupervised representation learning.
items.zh: 估计复杂的高维数据分布是无监督学习中的一个核心问题，因为许多感兴趣的下游应用涉及文本、图像、音频和其他数据的生成。此外，它被认为是无监督表示学习的关键组成部分。

items.en: Recently, neural autoregressive models have achieved impressive results in this domain, achieving state-of-the-art in modeling natural language (Jozefowicz et al., 2016) (Radford et al., 2018) (Dai et al., 2018), raw audio (Van Den Oord et al., 2016) (Mehri et al., 2016), and images (Oord et al., 2016) (Menick & Kalchbrenner, 2018) (Salimans et al., 2017) (Reed et al., 2017) (Chen et al., 2017).
items.zh: 最近，神经自回归模型在该领域取得了令人瞩目的成果，在自然语言建模（Jozefowicz 等人，2016；Radford 等人，2018；Dai 等人，2018）、原始音频（Van Den Oord 等人，2016；Mehri 等人，2016）和图像（Oord 等人，2016；Menick & Kalchbrenner，2018；Salimans 等人，2017；Reed 等人，2017；Chen 等人，2017）方面达到了最优水平。

items.en: These methods decompose a joint probability distribution into a product of conditional ones. Modeling these conditional distributions is extremely challenging, however, as they contain many complex, long-range dependencies and require a suitably expressive model architecture to learn them.
items.zh: 这些方法将联合概率分布分解为条件概率的乘积。然而，对这些条件分布进行建模极具挑战性，因为它们包含许多复杂的长期依赖关系，并且需要足够表达力的模型架构来学习它们。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Unconditional samples from our neural autoregressive model on ImageNet 64 and a classical music dataset. We used the same self-attention based architecture for audio, images, and text. The samples above were generated with softmax temperature 1.0, and had lengths 12,288 and 65,536. Audio samples be listened to at https://openai.com/blog/sparse-transformer
items.capZh: 图 1：我们的神经自回归模型在 ImageNet 64 和古典音乐数据集上的无条件样本。我们对音频、图像和文本使用了相同的基于自注意力的架构。上述样本以 softmax 温度 1.0 生成，长度分别为 12,288 和 65,536。音频样本可在 https://openai.com/blog/sparse-transformer 收听。

items.en: Architectures based off CNNs (Oord et al., 2016) have made great progress in this direction, but require significant depth to expand their receptive field. To address this, WaveNet (Van Den Oord et al., 2016) introduced dilated convolutions, which allowed the network to model long-range dependencies in a logarithmic number of layers.
items.zh: 基于 CNN 的架构（Oord 等人，2016）在这一方向上取得了很大进展，但需要显著的深度来扩大其感受野。为了解决这个问题，WaveNet（Van Den Oord 等人，2016）引入了扩张卷积，使得网络能够在对数层数内建模长期依赖关系。

items.en: Separately, the Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) has been shown to excel on many natural language tasks, which may be in part due to its ability to model arbitrary dependencies in a constant number of layers. As each self-attention layer has a global receptive field, the network can allocate representational capacity to the input regions for which it is most useful. Thus the architecture may be more flexible at generating diverse data types than networks with fixed connectivity patterns.
items.zh: 另外，Transformer（Vaswani 等人，2017）已被证明在许多自然语言任务上表现出色，这在一定程度上可能归功于其能够在恒定层数内建模任意依赖关系。由于每个自注意力层具有全局感受野，网络可以将表示能力分配到最有用的输入区域。因此，该架构可能比具有固定连接模式的网络更灵活地生成多样化的数据类型。

items.en: However, the memory and computational requirements of such networks grows quadratically with sequence length, which excludes their use on long sequences.
items.zh: 然而，此类网络的内存和计算需求随序列长度呈二次增长，这排除了它们在长序列上的使用。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Learned attention patterns from a 128-layer network on CIFAR-10 trained with full attention. White highlights denote attention weights for a head while generating a given pixel, and black denotes the autoregressive mask. Layers are able to learn a variety of specialized sparse structures, which may explain their ability to adapt to different domains. a) Many early layers in the network learn locally connected patterns, which resemble convolution. b) In layers 19 and 20, the network learned to split the attention across a row attention and column attention, effectively factorizing the global attention calculation. c) Several attention layers showed global, data-dependent access patterns. d) Typical layers in layers 64-128 exhibited high sparsity, with positions activating rarely and only for specific input patterns.
items.capZh: 图 2：在 CIFAR-10 上使用全注意力训练的 128 层网络的学习注意力模式。白色高亮表示生成给定像素时一个注意力头的注意力权重，黑色表示自回归掩码。各层能够学习各种专门的稀疏结构，这可能解释了它们适应不同领域的能力。a) 网络中的许多早期层学习局部连接模式，类似于卷积。b) 在第 19 和 20 层，网络学会了将注意力拆分为行注意力和列注意力，有效地分解了全局注意力计算。c) 几个注意力层表现出全局的、数据依赖的访问模式。d) 第 64-128 层的典型层表现出高度稀疏性，位置很少激活且仅针对特定输入模式。

items.en: The main contribution of this work is to introduce several sparse factorizations of the attention matrix, which scale as O​(n​np)𝑂𝑛𝑝𝑛O(n\sqrt[p]{n}) with the sequence length without sacrificing performance. These work by separating the full attention computation into several faster attention operations which, when combined, can approximate the dense attention operation. We use this to apply self-attention to sequences of unprecedented length.
items.zh: 本文的主要贡献是引入了注意力矩阵的几种稀疏分解，其随序列长度以 O(n√[p]{n}) 缩放，且不牺牲性能。这些分解将完整的注意力计算分离为几个更快的注意力操作，当组合时，可以近似密集注意力操作。我们利用这一点将自注意力应用于前所未有的长序列。

items.en: Additionally, we introduce several other changes to the Transformer, including:
items.zh: 此外，我们还对 Transformer 进行了其他几项更改，包括：

items.en: A restructured residual block and weight initialization to improve training of very deep networks
items.zh: 重构的残差块和权重初始化，以改进非常深网络的训练

items.en: A set of sparse attention kernels which efficiently compute subsets of the attention matrix
items.zh: 一组稀疏注意力核，高效计算注意力矩阵的子集

items.en: Recomputation of attention weights during the backwards pass to reduce memory usage
items.zh: 在反向传播期间重计算注意力权重以减少内存使用

items.en: We empirically validate that models augmented in this manner can achieve state-of-the-art compression and generation of natural language, raw audio, and natural images. The simplicity of the architecture leads us to believe it may be useful for many problems of interest.
items.zh: 我们通过实验验证，以这种方式增强的模型可以在自然语言、原始音频和自然图像的压缩与生成方面达到最优水平。架构的简洁性使我们相信它可能对许多感兴趣的问题有用。

items.en: The most related work involves other techniques for scaling up autoregressive generative models. For images, (Reed et al., 2017) models conditional independence between the pixels in order to generate many locations in parallel, and (Menick & Kalchbrenner, 2018) imposes an ordering and multi-scale upsampling procedure to generate high fidelity samples. (Parmar et al., 2018) uses blocks of local attention to apply Transformers to images. For text, (Dai et al., 2018) introduces a state reuse ”memory” for modeling long-term dependencies. And for audio, in addition to (Van Den Oord et al., 2016), (Mehri et al., 2016) used a hierarchical structure and RNNs of varying clock-rates to use long contexts during inference, similar to (Koutnik et al., 2014). (Huang et al., 2018) apply Transformers to MIDI generation with an efficient relative attention.
items.zh: 最相关的工作涉及扩展自回归生成模型的其他技术。对于图像，（Reed 等人，2017）对像素之间的条件独立性进行建模，以便并行生成多个位置；（Menick & Kalchbrenner，2018）引入了排序和多尺度上采样过程以生成高保真样本。（Parmar 等人，2018）使用局部注意力块将 Transformer 应用于图像。对于文本，（Dai 等人，2018）引入了状态重用“记忆”来建模长期依赖关系。对于音频，除了（Van Den Oord 等人，2016）之外，（Mehri 等人，2016）使用了层次结构和不同时钟频率的 RNN，以便在推理时使用长上下文，类似于（Koutnik 等人，2014）。（Huang 等人，2018）将 Transformer 应用于 MIDI 生成，采用了高效的相对注意力。

items.en: Our work is simpler than many of the techniques above and can be applied equally across images, text, and audio. Many of the above techniques are orthogonal to ours, moreover, and could be used in conjunction with ours.
items.zh: 我们的工作比上述许多技术更简单，并且可以同样应用于图像、文本和音频。此外，上述许多技术与我们的工作正交，并且可以与我们的工作结合使用。

items.en: Outside of generative modeling, there are several works relevant to improving the efficiency of attention based off chunking (Chiu & Raffel, 2017) or using fixed length representations (Britz et al., 2017). Other works have investigated attention with multiple ”hops”, such as (Sukhbaatar et al., 2015) and (Gehring et al., 2017).
items.zh: 在生成式建模之外，还有一些工作通过分块（Chiu & Raffel, 2017）或使用固定长度表示（Britz et al., 2017）来提高注意力机制的效率。其他工作研究了具有多“跳”注意力的方法，例如（Sukhbaatar et al., 2015）和（Gehring et al., 2017）。

items.en: It is worth noting that the Gated Pixel CNN (Oord et al., 2016) and WaveNet (Van Den Oord et al., 2016) use multiplicative interactions in their networks, which are related to self-attention.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，Gated Pixel CNN（Oord et al., 2016）和WaveNet（Van Den Oord et al., 2016）在其网络中使用了乘法交互，这与自注意力机制相关。

items.en: We consider the task of autoregressive sequence generation, where the joint probability of a sequence 𝐱={x1,x2,…,xn}𝐱subscript𝑥1subscript𝑥2…subscript𝑥𝑛\mathbf{x}=\{x_{1},x_{2},...,x_{n}\} is modeled as the product of conditional probability distributions and parameterized by a network θ𝜃\theta.
items.zh: 我们考虑自回归序列生成任务，其中序列 𝐱={x1,x2,…,xn} 的联合概率被建模为条件概率分布的乘积，并由网络 θ 参数化。

items.en: We treat images, text, and audio as a sequence of discrete tokens, typically raw bytes. The network θ𝜃\theta takes in the sequence of tokens and outputs a categorical distribution over the v𝑣v possible values of the next token using the softmaxsoftmax\mathrm{softmax} function, where v𝑣v is the size of the vocabulary. The training objective is to maximize the log-probability of the data with respect to θ𝜃\theta.
items.zh: 我们将图像、文本和音频视为离散词元的序列，通常是原始字节。网络 θ 接收词元序列，并使用 softmax 函数输出下一个词元的 v 个可能值的分类分布，其中 v 是词汇表大小。训练目标是最大化数据相对于 θ 的对数概率。

items.en: A simple and powerful choice for model θ𝜃\theta is a Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) in decoder-only mode, as demonstrated by (Radford et al., 2018) and (Liu et al., 2018). These models transform the input sequence with blocks of multihead self-attention over the entire sequence, followed by dense transformations over each sequence element. The self-attention portion of the network must compute n𝑛n weightings for each of n𝑛n elements, however, which can quickly become intractable as the sequence length grows.
items.zh: 模型 θ 的一个简单而强大的选择是仅解码器模式的 Transformer（Vaswani et al., 2017），如（Radford et al., 2018）和（Liu et al., 2018）所示。这些模型通过在整个序列上的多头自注意力块转换输入序列，然后对每个序列元素进行密集变换。然而，网络的自注意力部分必须为 n 个元素中的每一个计算 n 个权重，随着序列长度的增长，这可能会变得难以处理。

items.en: In the following sections, we describe our modifications to the Transformer architecture which make it more suitable for modeling long sequences.
items.zh: 在以下章节中，我们描述了对 Transformer 架构的修改，使其更适合建模长序列。

items.en: Sparse Transformers separate the full self-attention operation across several steps of attention, as visualized in Figure 3(b) and 3(c). To motivate our approach, we first perform a qualitative assessment of attention patterns learned by a standard Transformer on an image dataset.
items.zh: 稀疏 Transformer 将完整的自注意力操作分解为几个注意力步骤，如图 3(b) 和 3(c) 所示。为了激发我们的方法，我们首先对标准 Transformer 在图像数据集上学习的注意力模式进行定性评估。

full.sec: 4.1 Qualitative assessment of learned attention patterns
full.secZh: 4.1 学习到的注意力模式的定性评估

items.en: We visualized the attention patterns learned by a 128-layer self-attention network on CIFAR-10, and present several examples in Figure 2. Visual inspection showed that most layers had sparse attention patterns across most data points, suggesting that some form of sparsity could be introduced without significantly affecting performance. Several layers (Figure 2c) clearly exhibited global patterns, however, and others exhibited data-dependent sparsity (Figure 2d), both of which would be impacted by introducing a predetermined sparsity pattern into all of the attention matrices.
items.zh: 我们可视化了在 CIFAR-10 上训练的 128 层自注意力网络学习的注意力模式，并在图 2 中展示了几个示例。视觉检查表明，大多数层在大多数数据点上具有稀疏的注意力模式，这表明可以在不显著影响性能的情况下引入某种形式的稀疏性。然而，一些层（图 2c）明显表现出全局模式，而其他层则表现出数据相关的稀疏性（图 2d），这两者都会受到在所有注意力矩阵中引入预定稀疏模式的影响。

items.en: In this paper, we restricted our investigation to a class of sparse attention patterns that have connectivity between all positions over several steps of attention. These methods can be more efficient than full attention while still providing global context to any given position. We aimed to empirically validate the performance of these factorized patterns on a range of tasks, given that they are unable to learn the exact same mappings as those in Figure 2. We present the formulation of factorized attention below.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们将研究限制在一类稀疏注意力模式上，这些模式在几个注意力步骤中在所有位置之间具有连接性。这些方法可以比全注意力更高效，同时仍然为任何给定位置提供全局上下文。我们的目标是在一系列任务上实证验证这些分解模式的性能，因为它们无法学习与图 2 中完全相同的映射。下面我们给出分解注意力的公式。

items.en: A self-attention layer maps a matrix of input embeddings X𝑋X to an output matrix and is parameterized by a connectivity pattern S={S1,…,Sn}𝑆subscript𝑆1…subscript𝑆𝑛S=\{S_{1},...,S_{n}\}, where Sisubscript𝑆𝑖S_{i} denotes the set of indices of the input vectors to which the i𝑖ith output vector attends. The output vector is a weighted sum of transformations of the input vectors:
items.zh: 自注意力层将输入嵌入矩阵 X 映射到输出矩阵，并由连接模式 S={S1,…,Sn} 参数化，其中 Si 表示第 i 个输出向量所关注的输入向量的索引集。输出向量是输入向量变换后的加权和：

items.en: Here Wqsubscript𝑊𝑞W_{q}, Wksubscript𝑊𝑘W_{k}, and Wvsubscript𝑊𝑣W_{v} represent the weight matrices which transform a given 𝐱isubscript𝐱𝑖\mathbf{x}_{i} into a query, key, or value, and d𝑑d is the inner dimension of the queries and keys. The output at each position is a sum of the values weighted by the scaled dot-product similarity of the keys and queries.
items.zh: 这里 Wq、Wk 和 Wv 表示将给定 xi 转换为查询、键或值的权重矩阵，d 是查询和键的内部维度。每个位置的输出是值乘以键和查询的缩放点积相似度后的加权和。

items.en: Full self-attention for autoregressive models defines Si={j:j≤i}subscript𝑆𝑖conditional-set𝑗𝑗𝑖S_{i}=\{j:j\leq i\}, allowing every element to attend to all previous positions and its own position.
items.zh: 自回归模型的全自注意力定义 Si={j:j≤i}，允许每个元素关注所有先前位置及其自身位置。

items.en: Factorized self-attention instead has p𝑝p separate attention heads, where the m𝑚mth head defines a subset of the indices Ai(m)⊂{j:j≤i}superscriptsubscript𝐴𝑖𝑚conditional-set𝑗𝑗𝑖A_{i}^{(m)}\subset\{j:j\leq i\} and lets Si=Ai(m)subscript𝑆𝑖superscriptsubscript𝐴𝑖𝑚S_{i}=A_{i}^{(m)}. We are chiefly interested in efficient choices for the subset A𝐴A, where |Ai(m)|∝npproportional-tosuperscriptsubscript𝐴𝑖𝑚𝑝𝑛|A_{i}^{(m)}|\propto\sqrt[p]{n}.
items.zh: 分解自注意力则有 p 个独立的注意力头，其中第 m 个头定义索引子集 Ai(m)⊂{j:j≤i}，并令 Si=Ai(m)。我们主要关注 A 的高效选择，其中 |Ai(m)|∝n√p。

items.en: Additionally, for the time being we consider valid choices of A𝐴A, where all input positions are connected to all future output positions across the p𝑝p steps of attention.
items.zh: 此外，目前我们考虑 A 的有效选择，其中所有输入位置通过 p 个注意力步骤连接到所有未来输出位置。

items.en: For every j≤i𝑗𝑖j\leq i pair, we set every A𝐴A such that i𝑖i can attend to j𝑗j through a path of locations with maximum length p+1𝑝1p+1. Specifically, if (j,a,b,c,…,i)𝑗𝑎𝑏𝑐…𝑖(j,a,b,c,...,i) is the path of indices, then j∈Aa(1)𝑗superscriptsubscript𝐴𝑎1j\in A_{a}^{(1)}, a∈Ab(2)𝑎superscriptsubscript𝐴𝑏2a\in A_{b}^{(2)}, b∈Ac(3)𝑏superscriptsubscript𝐴𝑐3b\in A_{c}^{(3)}, and so forth.
items.zh: 对于每一对 j≤i，我们设置每个 A，使得 i 可以通过长度最多为 p+1 的路径位置关注 j。具体来说，如果 (j,a,b,c,…,i) 是索引路径，则 j∈Aa(1)，a∈Ab(2)，b∈Ac(3)，依此类推。

items.en: These two criteria allow us keep the ability of Transformers to propagate signals from arbitrary input positions to arbitrary output positions in a constant number of steps, while reducing the total effective computation to O​(n​np)𝑂𝑛𝑝𝑛O(n\sqrt[p]{n}). We also note that softening the validity criterion (for instance, having a series of only locally connected layers) may be a useful inductive bias for certain domains.
items.zh: 这两个标准使我们能够保持 Transformer 在恒定步数内将信号从任意输入位置传播到任意输出位置的能力，同时将总有效计算量减少到 O(n n√p)。我们还注意到，软化有效性标准（例如，仅使用一系列局部连接层）可能对某些领域是有用的归纳偏置。

items.en: In this work, we explore two factorizations for p=2𝑝2p=2, which we describe in the following section, though we note that the same techniques can be easily extended to higher dimensions.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们探索了 p=2 的两种分解，我们将在下一节中描述，尽管我们注意到相同的方法可以轻松扩展到更高维度。

items.en: A natural approach to defining a factorized attention pattern in two dimensions is to have one head attend to the previous l𝑙l locations, and the other head attend to every l𝑙lth location, where l𝑙l is the stride and chosen to be close to n𝑛\sqrt{n}, a method we call strided attention.
items.zh: 在二维中定义分解注意力模式的一种自然方法是让一个头关注前 l 个位置，另一个头关注每第 l 个位置，其中 l 是步长，选择接近 √n，我们称这种方法为步长注意力。

items.en: Formally, Ai(1)={t,t+1,…,i}superscriptsubscript𝐴𝑖1𝑡𝑡1…𝑖A_{i}^{(1)}=\{t,t+1,...,i\} for t=max​(0,i−l)𝑡max0𝑖𝑙t=\mathrm{max}(0,i-l) and Ai(2)={j:(i−j)modl=0}superscriptsubscript𝐴𝑖2conditional-set𝑗modulo𝑖𝑗𝑙0A_{i}^{(2)}=\{j:(i-j)\bmod l=0\}. This pattern can be visualized in Figure 3(b).
items.zh: 形式上，Ai(1)={t,t+1,…,i}，其中 t=max(0,i−l)，且 Ai(2)={j:(i−j) mod l=0}。这种模式可以在图 3(b) 中可视化。

items.en: This formulation is convenient if the data naturally has a structure that aligns with the stride, like images or some types of music. For data without a periodic structure, like text, however, we find that the network can fail to properly route information with the strided pattern, as spatial coordinates for an element do not necessarily correlate with the positions where the element may be most relevant in the future.
items.zh: 如果数据自然具有与步长对齐的结构，例如图像或某些类型的音乐，这种公式很方便。然而，对于没有周期性结构的数据（如文本），我们发现网络可能无法使用步长模式正确路由信息，因为元素的坐标不一定与未来该元素可能最相关的位置相关。

items.en: In those cases, we instead use a fixed attention pattern (Figure 3(c)), where specific cells summarize previous locations and propagate that information to all future cells.
items.zh: 在这些情况下，我们转而使用固定的注意力模式（图3(c)），其中特定的单元总结先前的位置并将该信息传播到所有未来的单元。

items.en: Formally, Ai(1)={j:(⌊j/l⌋=⌊i/l⌋)}superscriptsubscript𝐴𝑖1conditional-set𝑗𝑗𝑙𝑖𝑙A_{i}^{(1)}=\{j:(\lfloor j/l\rfloor=\lfloor i/l\rfloor)\}, where the brackets denote the floor operation, and Ai(2)={j:jmodl∈{t,t+1,…,l}A_{i}^{(2)}=\{j:j\bmod l\in\{t,t+1,...,l\}, where t=l−c𝑡𝑙𝑐t=l-c and c𝑐c is a hyperparameter.
items.zh: 形式上，Ai(1)={j:(⌊j/l⌋=⌊i/l⌋)}，其中括号表示向下取整操作，而Ai(2)={j:j mod l ∈ {t, t+1, ..., l}}，其中t=l-c，c是一个超参数。

items.en: Concretely, if the stride is 128 and c=8𝑐8c=8, then all future positions greater than 128 can attend to positions 120-128, all positions greater than 256 can attend to 248-256, and so forth.
items.zh: 具体来说，如果步长为128且c=8，那么所有大于128的未来位置可以关注位置120-128，所有大于256的位置可以关注248-256，依此类推。

items.en: A fixed-attention pattern with c=1𝑐1c=1 limits the expressivity of the network significantly, as many representations in the network are only used for one block whereas a small number of locations are used by all blocks. We instead found choosing c∈{8,16,32}𝑐81632c\in\{8,16,32\} for typical values of l∈{128,256}𝑙128256l\in\{128,256\} to perform well, although it should be noted that this increases the computational cost of this method by c𝑐c in comparison to the strided attention.
items.zh: c=1的固定注意力模式会显著限制网络的表达能力，因为网络中的许多表示仅用于一个块，而少数位置被所有块使用。相反，我们发现对于l∈{128,256}的典型值，选择c∈{8,16,32}表现良好，但应注意，与步进注意力相比，这会使该方法的计算成本增加c倍。

items.en: Additionally, we found that when using multiple heads, having them attend to distinct subblocks of length c𝑐c within the block of size l𝑙l was preferable to having them attend to the same subblock.
items.zh: 此外，我们发现当使用多个注意力头时，让它们关注大小为l的块内长度为c的不同子块，比让它们关注相同的子块更可取。

items.en: In the subsequent section, we describe how to incorporate factorized attention into the Sparse Transformer architecture.
items.zh: 在接下来的部分中，我们将描述如何将分解注意力整合到Sparse Transformer架构中。

items.en: Here we fully describe the Sparse Transformer architecture, which is a modified version of the Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017).
items.zh: 这里我们完整描述Sparse Transformer架构，它是Transformer（Vaswani等人，2017）的修改版本。

items.en: Standard dense attention simply performs a linear transformation of the attendattend\mathrm{attend} function defined in Equation 2:
items.zh: 标准密集注意力仅对公式2中定义的attend函数进行线性变换：

items.en: where Wpsubscript𝑊𝑝W_{p} denotes the post-attention weight matrix. The simplest technique for integrating factorized self-attention is to use one attention type per residual block, and interleave them sequentially or at a ratio determined as a hyperparameter:
items.zh: 其中Wp表示注意力后权重矩阵。整合分解自注意力的最简单方法是在每个残差块中使用一种注意力类型，并按顺序或按超参数确定的比率交替使用：

items.en: Here r𝑟r is the index of the current residual block and p𝑝p is the number of factorized attention heads.
items.zh: 这里r是当前残差块的索引，p是分解注意力头的数量。

items.en: A second approach is to have a single head attend to the locations of the pixels that both factorized heads would attend to, which we call a merged head:
items.zh: 第二种方法是让单个头关注两个分解头都会关注的像素位置，我们称之为合并头：

items.en: This is slightly more computationally intensive, but only by a constant factor. A third approach is to use multi-head attention (Vaswani et al., 2017), where nhsubscript𝑛ℎn_{h} attention products are computed in parallel, then concatenated along the feature dimension:
items.zh: 这稍微增加了计算量，但仅增加一个常数因子。第三种方法是使用多头注意力（Vaswani等人，2017），其中并行计算nh个注意力乘积，然后沿特征维度拼接：

items.en: Here, the A𝐴A can be the separate attention patterns, the merged patterns, or interleaved as in Eq. 2. Also, the dimensions of the weight matrices inside the attendattend\mathrm{attend} function are reduced by a factor of 1/nh1subscript𝑛ℎ1/n_{h}, such that the number of parameters are invariant across values of nhsubscript𝑛ℎn_{h}.
items.zh: 这里，A可以是单独的注意力模式、合并模式，或如公式2中交替使用。此外，attend函数内部的权重矩阵维度减少了1/nh倍，使得参数数量在不同nh值下保持不变。

items.en: We typically find multiple heads to work well, though for extremely long sequences where the attention dominates the computation time, it is more worthwhile to perform them one at a time and sequentially.
items.zh: 我们通常发现多个头效果良好，但对于注意力占主导计算时间的极长序列，逐个顺序执行更值得。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Diagram depicting one residual block of the Sparse Transformer. The shaded background indicates tensors which are checkpointed (Chen et al., 2016) and stored in GPU memory. The other tensors, including the attention weights and feedforward network activations, are recomputed during the calculation of gradients, reducing memory usage substantially.
items.capZh: 图4：描述Sparse Transformer的一个残差块的示意图。阴影背景表示已检查点（Chen等人，2016）并存储在GPU内存中的张量。其他张量，包括注意力权重和前馈网络激活，在梯度计算期间重新计算，从而大幅减少内存使用。

items.en: We found that Transformers were difficult to train with many layers, as noted by (Al-Rfou et al., 2018). Instead of incorporating auxillary losses, we adopted the following architectural changes.
items.zh: 我们发现Transformer难以训练多层，正如（Al-Rfou等人，2018）所指出的。我们没有采用辅助损失，而是采用了以下架构更改。

items.en: First, we use the pre-activation residual block of (He et al., 2016), defining a network of N𝑁N layers in the following way:
items.zh: 首先，我们使用（He等人，2016）的预激活残差块，按以下方式定义N层网络：

items.en: where embedembed\mathrm{embed} is a function we describe in the next section, Wo​u​tsubscript𝑊𝑜𝑢𝑡W_{out} is a weight matrix, and resblock​(h)resblockℎ\mathrm{resblock}(h) normalizes the input to the attention block and a positionwise feedforward network in the following way:
items.zh: 其中embed是我们在下一节描述的函数，Wout是权重矩阵，resblock(h)按以下方式对注意力块的输入和逐位置前馈网络进行归一化：

items.en: The normnorm\mathrm{norm} function denotes Layer Normalization (Ba et al., 2016), and ff​(x)=W2​f​(W1​x+b1)+b2ff𝑥subscript𝑊2𝑓subscript𝑊1𝑥subscript𝑏1subscript𝑏2\mathrm{ff}(x)=W_{2}\,f(W_{1}x+b_{1})+b_{2}. Our choice of f𝑓f is the Gaussian Error Linear Unit (Hendrycks & Gimpel, 2016), f​(X)=X⊙sigmoid​(1.702⋅X)𝑓𝑋direct-product𝑋sigmoid⋅1.702𝑋f(X)=X\odot\,\mathrm{sigmoid}(1.702\cdot X), as used in (Radford et al., 2018). The output dimension of W1subscript𝑊1W_{1} is 4.0 times the input dimension, unless otherwise noted.
items.zh: norm函数表示层归一化（Ba等人，2016），ff(x)=W2 f(W1 x + b1) + b2。我们选择的f是高斯误差线性单元（Hendrycks & Gimpel, 2016），f(X)=X ⊙ sigmoid(1.702·X)，如（Radford等人，2018）所用。除非另有说明，W1的输出维度是输入维度的4.0倍。

items.en: Observe that HNsubscript𝐻𝑁H_{N} is the sum of N𝑁N applications of functions a𝑎a and b𝑏b, and thus each function block receives a gradient directly from the output layer . We scale the initialization of W2subscript𝑊2W_{2} and Wpsubscript𝑊𝑝W_{p} in Eq. 5 by 12​N12𝑁\frac{1}{\sqrt{2N}} to keep the ratio of input embedding scale to residual block scale invariant across values of N𝑁N.
items.zh: 注意，HN是N个函数a和b应用的总和，因此每个函数块直接从输出层接收梯度。我们将公式5中W2和Wp的初始化缩放1/√(2N)，以保持输入嵌入尺度与残差块尺度之比在不同N值下不变。

items.en: In addition to the embedding of input symbols, positional embeddings are typically used in Transformers and other location-agnostic architectures to encode the spatial relationships of data (Gehring et al., 2017), (Parmar et al., 2018).
items.zh: 除了输入符号的嵌入，Transformer 和其他位置无关架构通常使用位置嵌入来编码数据的空间关系（Gehring 等人，2017；Parmar 等人，2018）。

items.en: We found using learned embeddings which either encoded the structure of the data or the factorized attention patterns were important for performance of our models.
items.zh: 我们发现，使用学习到的嵌入（编码数据结构或分解注意力模式）对于模型性能至关重要。

items.en: We added either ne​m​b=dd​a​t​asubscript𝑛𝑒𝑚𝑏subscript𝑑𝑑𝑎𝑡𝑎n_{emb}=d_{data} or ne​m​b=da​t​t​nsubscript𝑛𝑒𝑚𝑏subscript𝑑𝑎𝑡𝑡𝑛n_{emb}=d_{attn} embeddings to each input location, where dd​a​t​asubscript𝑑𝑑𝑎𝑡𝑎d_{data} refers to the number of dimensions of the data, and da​t​t​nsubscript𝑑𝑎𝑡𝑡𝑛d_{attn} is the number of dimensions of the factorized attention. If 𝐱isubscript𝐱𝑖\mathbf{x}_{i} is the one-hot encoded i𝑖ith element in the sequence, and 𝐨i(j)superscriptsubscript𝐨𝑖𝑗\mathbf{o}_{i}^{(j)} represents the one-hot encoded position of 𝐱isubscript𝐱𝑖\mathbf{x}_{i} in the j𝑗jth dimension (1≤j≤ne​m​b1𝑗subscript𝑛𝑒𝑚𝑏1\leq j\leq n_{emb}), then:
items.zh: 我们向每个输入位置添加了 n_emb = d_data 或 n_emb = d_attn 个嵌入，其中 d_data 表示数据的维度数，d_attn 是分解注意力的维度数。如果 x_i 是序列中第 i 个元素的独热编码，而 o_i^(j) 表示 x_i 在第 j 个维度（1 ≤ j ≤ n_emb）上的独热编码位置，则：

items.en: For images, we used data embeddings, where dd​a​t​a=3subscript𝑑𝑑𝑎𝑡𝑎3d_{data}=3 for the row, column, and channel location of each input byte. For text and audio, we used two-dimensional attention embeddings, where da​t​t​n=2subscript𝑑𝑎𝑡𝑡𝑛2d_{attn}=2 and the index corresponds to each position’s row and column index in a matrix of width equal to the stride.
items.zh: 对于图像，我们使用了数据嵌入，其中 d_data = 3，对应每个输入字节的行、列和通道位置。对于文本和音频，我们使用了二维注意力嵌入，其中 d_attn = 2，索引对应每个位置在宽度等于步长的矩阵中的行和列索引。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Unconditional samples from ImageNet 64x64, generated with an unmodified softmax temperature of 1.0. We are able to learn long-range dependencies directly from pixels without using a multi-scale architecture.
items.capZh: 图 5：来自 ImageNet 64x64 的无条件样本，使用未修改的 softmax 温度 1.0 生成。我们能够直接从像素中学习长程依赖，而无需使用多尺度架构。

full.sec: 5.4 Saving memory by recomputing attention weights
full.secZh: 5.4 通过重新计算注意力权重节省内存

items.en: Gradient checkpointing has been shown to be effective in reducing the memory requirements of training deep neural networks (Chen et al., 2016), (Gruslys et al., 2016). It is worth noting, however, that this technique is particularly effective for self-attention layers when long sequences are processed, as memory usage is high for these layers relative to the cost of computing them.
items.zh: 梯度检查点已被证明能有效减少训练深度神经网络的内存需求（Chen 等人，2016；Gruslys 等人，2016）。然而值得注意的是，该技术对于处理长序列的自注意力层尤其有效，因为这些层的内存使用相对于计算成本较高。

items.en: Using recomputation alone, we are able to train dense attention networks with hundreds of layers on sequence lengths of 16,384, which would be infeasible on modern hardware otherwise.
items.zh: 仅使用重计算，我们就能够训练具有数百层的密集注意力网络，处理序列长度达 16,384，这在现代硬件上否则是不可行的。

items.en: In our experiments, we recompute the attention and feed-forward blocks during the backwards pass. To simplify our implementation, we do not apply dropout within the attention blocks, as in (Vaswani et al., 2017), and instead only apply it at the end of each residual addition, as seen in Figure 4.
items.zh: 在我们的实验中，我们在反向传播期间重计算注意力和前馈块。为简化实现，我们没有在注意力块内应用 dropout（如 Vaswani 等人，2017），而是仅在每次残差加法结束时应用，如图 4 所示。

full.secZh: 5.5 高效的块稀疏注意力核

items.en: The sparse attention masks in 3(b) and 3(c) can be efficiently computed by slicing out sub-blocks from the query, key, and value matrices and computing the product in blocks. Attention over a local window can be computed as-is, whereas attention with a stride of k𝑘k can be computed by transposing the matrix and computing a local window. Fixed attention positions can be aggregated and computed in blocks.
items.zh: 图 3(b) 和 3(c) 中的稀疏注意力掩码可以通过从查询、键和值矩阵中切出子块并分块计算乘积来高效计算。局部窗口上的注意力可以直接计算，而步长为 k 的注意力可以通过转置矩阵并计算局部窗口来实现。固定注意力位置可以聚合后分块计算。

items.en: In order to ease experimentation, we implemented a set of GPU kernels which efficiently perform these operations. The softmax operation is fused into a single kernel and also uses registers to eliminate loading the input data more than once, allowing it to run at the same speed as a simple nonlinearity. The upper triangle of the attention matrix is never computed, moreover, removing the need for the negative bias term of (Vaswani et al., 2017) and halving the number of operations to be performed.
items.zh: 为简化实验，我们实现了一组 GPU 内核，可高效执行这些操作。Softmax 操作被融合到单个内核中，并使用寄存器避免多次加载输入数据，使其运行速度与简单非线性函数相同。注意力矩阵的上三角从未被计算，从而消除了 Vaswani 等人（2017）中的负偏置项，并将需要执行的操作数量减半。

items.en: We store network weights in single-precision floating-point, but otherwise compute network activations and gradients in half-precision, as in (Micikevicius et al., 2017). This accelerates our training due to the usage of Tensor Core operations on the V100 GPU. During the gradient calculation, we use dynamic loss scaling to reduce numerical underflow, and we communicate half-precision gradients when averaging across multiple GPUs. When sampling, we cast the queries and keys to single-precision, as the query-key product can sometimes overflow the max value of half-precision.
items.zh: 我们将网络权重存储为单精度浮点数，但网络激活和梯度使用半精度计算（如 Micikevicius 等人，2017）。这得益于 V100 GPU 上的 Tensor Core 操作，加速了训练。在梯度计算过程中，我们使用动态损失缩放来减少数值下溢，并在多 GPU 平均梯度时通信半精度梯度。采样时，我们将查询和键转换为单精度，因为查询-键乘积有时会溢出半精度的最大值。

items.en: We use the Adam optimizer with a linear warmup of 5000 iterations and a gradient clipping of 1.0, both of which we found important for model stability. We use a weight decay penalty of 0.01. We annealed the learning rate according to a cosine decay as in (Radford et al., 2018). We train on 8 V100 GPUs unless otherwise noted.
items.zh: 我们使用 Adam 优化器，线性预热 5000 次迭代，梯度裁剪为 1.0，这两者对于模型稳定性都很重要。我们使用 0.01 的权重衰减惩罚。学习率按照余弦衰减进行退火（如 Radford 等人，2018）。除非另有说明，我们在 8 个 V100 GPU 上进行训练。

items.en: All embeddings are of a constant dimension d𝑑d, usually one of {256,512,1024}2565121024\{256,512,1024\}. By default, all linear transforms are to the same dimension, with the exception of the feed-forward network, which projects the input to 4​d4𝑑4d, unless we use “half-size” transformations, where it is 2​d2𝑑2d. Additionally, sometimes we halve the size of the query and key transformations.
items.zh: 所有嵌入的维度 d 恒定，通常为 {256, 512, 1024} 之一。默认情况下，所有线性变换都映射到相同维度，但前馈网络除外，它将输入投影到 4d，除非我们使用“半尺寸”变换，此时为 2d。此外，有时我们会将查询和键变换的尺寸减半。

items.en: We initialize the token embedding Wesubscript𝑊𝑒W_{e} from 𝒩​(0,0.125d)𝒩00.125𝑑\mathcal{N}(0,\frac{0.125}{\sqrt{d}}) and the position embeddings from 𝒩​(0,0.125d​ne​m​b)𝒩00.125𝑑subscript𝑛𝑒𝑚𝑏\mathcal{N}(0,\frac{0.125}{\sqrt{dn_{emb}}}). Within the attention and feedforward components, all biases are initialized to 0 and all weights are initialized from 𝒩​(0,0.125di​n)𝒩00.125subscript𝑑𝑖𝑛\mathcal{N}(0,\frac{0.125}{\sqrt{d_{in}}}) where di​nsubscript𝑑𝑖𝑛d_{in} is the fan-in dimension. The weight matrix for the output logits was initialized to 0.
items.zh: 我们从 N(0, 0.125/√d) 初始化词嵌入 W_e，从 N(0, 0.125/√(d n_emb)) 初始化位置嵌入。在注意力和前馈组件中，所有偏置初始化为 0，所有权重从 N(0, 0.125/√d_in) 初始化，其中 d_in 是扇入维度。输出 logits 的权重矩阵初始化为 0。

items.en: We empirically test our architecture on density modeling tasks including natural images, text, and raw audio. A summary of the results is available in Table 1. We found that, in addition to running significantly faster than full attention, sparse patterns also converged to lower error, as shown in Table 2. This may point to a useful inductive bias from the sparsity patterns we introduced, or an underlying optimization issue with full attention.
items.zh: 我们通过密度建模任务（包括自然图像、文本和原始音频）实证测试了我们的架构。结果总结见表 1。我们发现，稀疏模式不仅运行速度显著快于全注意力，而且收敛到更低的误差，如表 2 所示。这可能表明我们引入的稀疏模式具有有用的归纳偏置，或者全注意力存在潜在的优化问题。

items.en: We train strided Sparse Transformers on CIFAR-10 images represented as sequences of 3072 bytes. Models have 2 heads, 128 layers, d𝑑d = 256, half-size feedforward network and query-key projections, and are trained for 120 epochs with a learning rate of 0.00035 and a dropout rate of 0.25 until validation error stops decreasing.
items.zh: 我们在 CIFAR-10 图像（表示为 3072 字节序列）上训练步进式稀疏 Transformer。模型有 2 个头、128 层、d = 256、半尺寸前馈网络和查询-键投影，训练 120 个 epoch，学习率 0.00035，dropout 率 0.25，直到验证误差停止下降。

items.en: We use 48000 examples for training and 2000 examples for validation, evaluating the performance of our best models on the test set. The model achieves 2.80 bits per dim (2.798±0.004plus-or-minus2.7980.0042.798\pm 0.004 over seeds 1, 2, 3) versus the previous 2.852.852.85 state of the art (Chen et al., 2017). We also compare performance of different attention patterns in Table 2. The strided attention reaches the lowest error in the shortest amount of time, surpassing the error of dense attention at 2.82 bits per dim.
items.zh: 我们使用 48000 个样本进行训练，2000 个样本进行验证，在测试集上评估最佳模型的性能。该模型达到每维 2.80 比特（种子 1、2、3 上为 2.798 ± 0.004），而之前的最优结果为 2.85（Chen 等人，2017）。我们还在表 2 中比较了不同注意力模式的性能。步进式注意力在最短时间内达到最低误差，以每维 2.82 比特的误差超越了密集注意力。

items.en: In order to assess Sparse Transformers on datasets without a strong two-dimensional structure, we trained models on the EnWik8 dataset, which represents the first 108superscript10810^{8} bytes of Wikipedia and contains a great degree of variability in periodic structure. We trained with a context length of 12,288, which is longer than previous approaches.
items.zh: 为了评估稀疏 Transformer 在缺乏强二维结构的数据集上的表现，我们在 EnWik8 数据集上训练了模型，该数据集包含 Wikipedia 的前 10^8 字节，具有很大的周期性结构变异性。我们训练的上下文长度为 12,288，比之前的方法更长。

items.en: We trained on the first 90 million tokens and reserved the last 10 million for validation and test. We used 30-layer fixed Sparse Transformers with 8 heads, d𝑑d = 512, and a dropout rate of 0.400.400.40. We trained for 80 epochs until validation loss stopped decreasing. We used a stride of 128, c=32𝑐32c=32, and merged the factorized attention heads.
items.zh: 我们在前 9000 万个 token 上训练，保留最后 1000 万个用于验证和测试。我们使用了 30 层固定稀疏 Transformer，8 个头，d = 512，dropout 率 0.40。训练 80 个 epoch，直到验证损失停止下降。我们使用步长 128，c = 32，并合并了分解注意力头。

items.en: Our best model reached 0.99 bits per dim (0.992±0.001plus-or-minus0.9920.0010.992\pm 0.001 over seeds 1, 2, 3), surpassing the 1.03 state-of-the-art for a similarly-sized Transformer-XL (Dai et al., 2018) and matching the 0.99 of a model trained with more than double the number of parameters. Strided attention failed to do well on this dataset, whereas fixed patterns were able to recover and surpass the performance of dense attention, as listed in Table 2.
items.zh: 我们的最佳模型达到每维 0.99 比特（种子 1、2、3 上为 0.992 ± 0.001），超越了类似大小的 Transformer-XL 的 1.03 最优结果（Dai 等人，2018），并与参数数量翻倍以上的模型的 0.99 结果持平。步进式注意力在此数据集上表现不佳，而固定模式能够恢复并超越密集注意力的性能，如表 2 所示。

items.en: Additionally, during evaluation of the test set, we modified the minimum context length the network could use by evaluating fewer tokens in parallel. We saw monotonic increases in performance with more tokens used, up to 12,160 out of the 12,288 tokens used for training (see Table 3), which suggests the network is effectively incorporating long-term dependencies.
items.zh: 此外，在测试集评估期间，我们通过并行评估更少的词元来修改网络可使用的最小上下文长度。我们观察到，随着使用的词元数量增加，性能单调提升，最多达到训练所用12,288个词元中的12,160个（见表3），这表明网络有效地利用了长期依赖关系。

items.en: In order to test the ability of the model to learn long range dependencies and scale to a large dataset, we train on the version of downsampled ImageNet released by (Oord et al., 2016) and evaluate on the validation set. We used a 48 layer strided Sparse Transformer with 16 attention heads and d𝑑d = 512, totaling 152 million parameters. We used a stride of 128, a dropout of 0.01, and trained for 70 epochs, which took 7 days on 64 V100 GPUs.
items.zh: 为了测试模型学习长程依赖关系并扩展到大数据集的能力，我们在(Oord等人, 2016)发布的下采样ImageNet版本上进行训练，并在验证集上评估。我们使用了一个48层步进Sparse Transformer，具有16个注意力头，d=512，总计1.52亿个参数。我们使用了步长为128，dropout为0.01，训练了70个epoch，在64块V100 GPU上耗时7天。

items.en: Our model achieves a loss of 3.44 bits per dim (3.437 across 1 run), in comparison to the previous 3.52 (Menick & Kalchbrenner, 2018).
items.zh: 我们的模型实现了每维度3.44比特的损失（单次运行3.437），而之前的结果为3.52（Menick & Kalchbrenner, 2018）。

items.en: Additionally, we generate unconditional samples (Figure 5) at an unmodified softmax temperature of 1.0, from the model and from one trained with twice the layers (300M parameters total). We include here samples from the 300M parameter model. On visual assessment we find no artifacts from the sparsity patterns and see evidence of long-term structure in most images.
items.zh: 此外，我们以未修改的softmax温度1.0从模型和另一个层数加倍（总计3亿参数）的模型中生成了无条件样本（图5）。这里我们包含来自3亿参数模型的样本。在视觉评估中，我们没有发现稀疏模式带来的伪影，并且在大多数图像中看到了长期结构的证据。

full.secZh: 7.4 从原始音频学习古典音乐

items.en: To test the extent to which Sparse Transformers are able to scale to very long contexts, we trained models on the classical music dataset released by (Dieleman et al., 2018). As details of the dataset processing are unavailable, we omit any direct comparison to other work and instead study what size of Sparse Transformer we can train with increasing context size. For each sequence length, we attempted to train the largest model which could entirely fit into 16GB V100 accelerators without model parallelism.
items.zh: 为了测试Sparse Transformer扩展到极长上下文的能力，我们在(Dieleman等人, 2018)发布的古典音乐数据集上训练了模型。由于数据集处理的细节不可用，我们省略了与其他工作的直接比较，而是研究随着上下文大小的增加，我们可以训练多大尺寸的Sparse Transformer。对于每个序列长度，我们尝试训练在不使用模型并行的情况下完全适合16GB V100加速器的最大模型。

items.en: Overall, we found that increasing the sequence length by a factor of 4 requires a reduction in model capacity of approximately 4​4=84484\sqrt{4}=8. Thus we found we could use factorized self-attention on sequences over 1 million timesteps long, albeit with extremely few parameters (3 million).
items.zh: 总体而言，我们发现将序列长度增加4倍需要将模型容量减少约4√4=8。因此，我们发现可以在超过100万个时间步长的序列上使用分解自注意力，尽管参数极少（300万）。

items.en: Samples are available for sequences of length 65,536, which correspond to around 5 seconds of generated audio at 12kHz. The samples clearly demonstrate global coherence over the sampled period, and exhibit a variety of play styles and tones, swapping from rhythmic playing to forceful. To listen to samples, visit https://openai.com/blog/sparse-transformer. Sample quality quickly degrades for greater sequence lengths due to reduced model capacity.
items.zh: 样本可用于长度为65,536的序列，这对应于12kHz下大约5秒的生成音频。样本清楚地展示了采样周期内的全局一致性，并表现出多种演奏风格和音调，从节奏演奏到有力演奏交替出现。要收听样本，请访问https://openai.com/blog/sparse-transformer。由于模型容量减少，更大序列长度的样本质量迅速下降。

items.en: We introduced Sparse Transformers and showed they attain equivalent or better performance on density modeling of long sequences than standard Transformers while requiring significantly fewer operations. This performance is state-of-the-art in images and text and is easily adaptable to raw audio. The model demonstrates usage of long-term context and generates globally coherent samples.
items.zh: 我们引入了Sparse Transformer，并证明它们在长序列密度建模上达到了与标准Transformer相当或更好的性能，同时所需操作显著减少。这一性能在图像和文本中达到了最先进水平，并且易于适应原始音频。该模型展示了长期上下文的使用能力，并生成了全局一致的样本。

items.en: We would like to thank Ashish Vaswani for insightful discussions during the genesis of the project. We also thank Joshua Meier and Mark Chen for helpful discussions, and Johannes Otterbach, Prafulla Dhariwal, and David Luan for feedback on drafts of this paper.
items.zh: 我们要感谢Ashish Vaswani在项目初期提供的深刻讨论。我们还感谢Joshua Meier和Mark Chen的有益讨论，以及Johannes Otterbach、Prafulla Dhariwal和David Luan对本文草稿的反馈。
